what: Build reconciliation report with conflict details
why: Provide actionable summary of vault state divergence for user or automated resolution
output: Reconciliation report object with per-file status, conflict details, and recommended actions

success_handling.criteria: Report is generated with complete file-by-file breakdown and summary statistics

error_handling.criteria: Unexpected error during report formatting or file write
error_handling.action: Return raw comparison data as fallback

event.message: Report generation failed, returning raw data: {error}

decisions.outcome: Proceed to save-cache step with raw data
